task_completion.description: The agent opens the harvester.py script in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., VS Code, nano, vim) is open showing the contents of the /home/ga/workspace/metadata_harvester/harvester.py file.

task_completion.description: The agent modifies the script to handle the OAI-PMH namespace and skip deleted records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code visible in the editor showing XML namespace handling (e.g., using a namespace dictionary or searching with namespaces) and a conditional check to skip records where the status attribute is 'deleted'.

task_completion.description: The agent modifies the script to extract all creators and join them with a semicolon and space.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code visible in the editor showing a join operation on the extracted creators or authors using the string '; '.

task_completion.description: The agent modifies the script to normalize title whitespace to single spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code visible in the editor showing whitespace normalization for the title, such as `' '.join(title.split())` or `re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', title)`.

task_completion.description: The agent runs the local test suite or script, which completes without errors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of the test suite (e.g., pytest, python test_harvester.py) or the script itself, with output indicating success (e.g., 'passed', 'OK', or successful database population with 3 records).

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the Python script rather than just printing out a fake success message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent editing the harvester.py file in an editor, not just running echo commands to fake output.

integrity.description: The test suite was executed in a real terminal environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test execution should be visible in a standard terminal emulator or VS Code terminal, showing genuine command execution.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the expected database values to bypass the parsing logic.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in harvester.py should contain actual XML parsing and string manipulation logic, not hardcoded strings like 'First string theory on a multiverse' or specific author names.
